scripts.medusa:start: cd apps/medusa && MEDUSA_DISABLE_ADMIN=true pnpm exec medusa start
scripts.medusa:migrate: cd apps/medusa && pnpm exec medusa db:migrate
scripts.verify:phase0: pnpm turbo build && pnpm turbo test && pnpm turbo typecheck && pnpm turbo lint && echo 'Phase 0 verification passed'
scripts.seed:medusa: cd apps/medusa && pnpm seed || echo 'run bootstrap first'
scripts.verify:local: echo '=== Seed validate ===' && npx tsx scripts/seed.ts --validate && echo '=== Typecheck ===' && pnpm --filter mobile-customer typecheck && pnpm --filter mobile-cook typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck && echo '=== verify:local PASSED ==='
scripts.dev:full: echo 'Start: pnpm docker:up && pnpm medusa:dev:admin && pnpm bootstrap:medusa && pnpm customer:dev & pnpm cook:dev & pnpm web:dev'
scripts.medusa:seed:validate: cd apps/medusa && npx tsx scripts/seed.ts || true
scripts.start:full: echo 'See LOCAL_TESTING.md and the instructions below. Run in separate terminals.'
scripts.cook:metro: cd apps/mobile-cook && RCT_METRO_PORT=8082 npx expo start --port 8082
